narrative:
Moraine 2-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,168 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
